ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved: Feature X Implemented
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that the issue reported in ticket #12345 has been resolved. The new feature X has been successfully integrated and is now available in the staging environment.

Please check the following pull request for the changes:

- PR #5678: Add Feature X to the product.

Let me know if you need any further tweaks. Thanks for your patience!

Best,
Rahul
Project Lead

spam.subject: ⚠️ Immediate Action Required: Your Crypto Wallet is Suspended
spam.body:
Dear User,

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity detected in your recent transactions. To avoid permanent suspension and potential loss of funds, you must verify your account immediately.

Please click the link below and follow the instructions:
<URL>

If you do not verify within 24 hours, your wallet will be permanently disabled. We strongly advise you to act now to protect your investments.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Wallet Security Team
